scope: Add a repo-local markdown exporter for saved MiroFish portfolio readouts and generate the medium-checkpoint export artifact

decision_context.prior_state: The repo could emit raw portfolio run packets and JSON readouts, but there was no clean human-facing export artifact for operators or downstream dashboard prep.
decision_context.decision: Add a markdown export command that formats a saved portfolio readout packet and use it to generate the medium-checkpoint export under research/meta.
decision_context.why_now: The current canonical artifact is the medium checkpoint, and the highest-value next step is to make that checkpoint easier to consume rather than launch another blind rerun.

files_expected.purpose: Adds markdown formatting for saved portfolio readout packets.
Adds the mirofish-portfolio-export command and plain-text output helper.
Stores the operator-facing markdown export built from the medium portfolio readout.
Captures why the export tranche was added.

planned_steps: Format saved portfolio readouts as operator-facing markdown
Expose the formatter through a repo-local CLI command
Verify the formatter with the focused portfolio regression suite

commands: $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m chip_labs.cli mirofish-portfolio-export --input research/meta/MIROFISH_PORTFOLIO_READOUT_515_MEDIUM_2026-03-24.json --output research/meta/MIROFISH_PORTFOLIO_EXPORT_515_MEDIUM_2026-03-24.md --title "MiroFish Portfolio Medium Export: 2026-03-24"
expected_checks: The focused regression suite stays green after the exporter is added
The export command emits a readable markdown artifact from the saved medium checkpoint readout
The markdown preserves top-line leaders, methodology cautions, and the main ranked tables

guardrails: Do not introduce a second ranking algorithm inside the export path
Build the markdown export from the saved readout packet rather than recomputing rankings
Keep the export artifact clearly downstream of the canonical medium checkpoint
